name: Kimi
description: Consumer chat and developer API from Moonshot AI (月之暗面) known for long-context models (200k+).

seo.title: Kimi — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Kimi: Consumer chat and developer API from Moonshot AI (月之暗面) known for long-context models (200k+).

when_to_use: Processing extremely long documents (up to 1M tokens) via LLM
Analyzing full codebases or books in a single context window
Building RAG-free QA systems using Kimi's native long context
Accessing Moonshot's frontier Chinese LLM via API for apps

pros: Free consumer tier drives rapid iteration
cons: Benchmarks don't always match real-world DX
review.verdict: A standout for long-context workloads if you can access the API from your region.
review.best_for: Apps processing long documents, contracts or codebases in single calls
review.not_for: Teams needing stable global SLAs or strict enterprise compliance

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
